core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Refactor Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Refactor Agent will become a stronger topology specialist that continuously improves graph neighborhoods, link quality, and containment structure across the growing vault.

## 2. Future Topology Surface
- better automatic detection of weak, stale, or confused relationships
- cleaner `part_of` repair workflows across hubs, atoms, and project lines
- deeper collaboration with Weaver, Gardener, Branch Steward Agent, and Review Agent
- more reliable night-shift graph refactors that stay bounded and reviewable

## 3. Operational Consequence
A growing vault will remain coherent not only in content but also in topological shape because graph repair will have an explicit maintenance lane instead of relying on opportunistic cleanup.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Graph Refactor Agent supports To Dig Deep by insisting that deep knowledge needs deep topology.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Refactor Agent defines the future continuous topology-repair lane for N1Hub: stronger weak-edge detection, cleaner containment repair, deeper collaboration with swarm maintenance roles, and more reliable bounded graph refactors during maintenance windows.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
